comparisons.new: Every step triggers the next one for you

comparisons.old: Customer names sit in a spreadsheet
comparisons.new: Customers flow through a living journey
AI spots opportunities before you miss them

chatExamples: Send a thank-you to everyone who visited this week.
Create a 10% discount for returning customers.
How many new leads came in this month?
Schedule a follow-up with Ahmed for next Tuesday.

flows.title: New enquiry → instant reply with catalogue & booking link
Booking confirmed → customer added → follow-up scheduled
Customer visits → earns loyalty points → gets a feedback request
Great feedback → referral invitation → reward if they bring a friend
Referral succeeds → new lead in pipeline → welcome message fires
Update published → shared on link page → waitlist notified

audiences.name: Small Business
audiences.tagline: Run your shop like a franchise
audiences.description: You wear every hat. SaveADay handles the repetitive customer work — follow-ups, bookings, loyalty — so you can focus on what you do best.

audiences.name: Medium Business
audiences.description: Multiple locations, growing teams, more moving parts. SaveADay keeps every customer touchpoint consistent across your operation — without hiring more people.
audiences.examples: Agencies · Hospitality groups · Professional services · Health & wellness chains

audiences.name: Enterprise
audiences.description: White-label the entire SaveADay platform under your brand. Single sign-on, isolated data, works with your existing stack out of the box.
audiences.examples: Franchise networks · SaaS platforms · Managed service providers

cta.title: Ready to stop juggling software and start growing?
cta.body: Join hundreds of businesses using SaveADay to turn one-time buyers into lifelong customers — on autopilot.
